nasb.text: Then Amaziah sent messengers to Jehoash, the son of Jehoahaz son of Jehu, king of Israel, saying, “Come, let us face each other.”

esv.text: Then Amaziah sent messengers to Jehoash the son of Jehoahaz, son of Jehu, king of Israel, saying, “Come, let us look one another in the face.”

cnv.text: 那時，亞瑪謝派使者去見耶戶的孫子、約哈斯的兒子以色列王約阿施說：“來，我們在戰場相見吧！”

ccb.text: 后来，亚玛谢差遣使者对耶户的孙子、约哈斯的儿子、以色列王约阿施说：“来，我们战场上见。”
